chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.513 of 2024 Cosmos Enterprises Versus M/s Abdullah & Brothers & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection a/w reply as at “A” 2. For orders on CMA 3206/24 3. For hearing of main case. 4. For orders on CMA 3207/24 Dated: 04.02.2025 Mr. Fahad Ali Hashmi for appellant. -.-.- Learned counsel for the appellant submits that in view of dismissal of suit he has been instructed not to press this appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Chief Justice Judge
